widgets.title: Units Sold by Category
queries: SELECT CATEGORY AS category, SUM(UNITS_SOLD) AS units_sold FROM PRODUCTS GROUP BY CATEGORY ORDER BY units_sold DESC

widgets.title: Products Bubble Chart
queries: SELECT PRICE AS _x, UNITS_SOLD AS _y, (PRICE * UNITS_SOLD) AS _z, PRODUCT_NAME AS _name FROM PRODUCTS

widgets.title: Monthly Revenue by Region
queries: SELECT "MONTH" AS category, SUM(CASE WHEN REGION = 'North' THEN REVENUE ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY "MONTH"
SELECT "MONTH" AS category, SUM(CASE WHEN REGION = 'South' THEN REVENUE ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY "MONTH"
SELECT "MONTH" AS category, SUM(CASE WHEN REGION = 'East' THEN REVENUE ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY "MONTH"
SELECT "MONTH" AS category, SUM(CASE WHEN REGION = 'West' THEN REVENUE ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY "MONTH" ORDER BY "MONTH"

widgets.title: Revenue Share by Region
queries: SELECT REGION AS category, SUM(REVENUE) AS total_revenue FROM SALES GROUP BY REGION ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

widgets.title: Customer Satisfaction
queries: SELECT CURRENT_VAL AS _y, TARGET_VAL AS _target FROM KPI_METRICS WHERE METRIC_NAME = 'Customer Satisfaction'
